reason: Verify descriptor exit remains aligned with global architecture invariants.
Verify RVV/scalar remain extension-family routes and descriptors do not define computation.
Verify default i32 sub/mul export uses typed lowerable ops and common EmitC materialization.
Verify runtime ABI role layering and target artifact preflight behavior.
Verify RVV sub/mul behavior matches plugin-local typed microkernel contract.
Verify scalar sub/mul behavior matches plugin-local typed fallback microkernel contract.
Verify no new core family-specific semantic branch was introduced.
Verify focused lit/C++ coverage matches the changed compiler behavior.
Verify implementation satisfies this round's module-level PRD and acceptance criteria.
